$comment: Type-check-only config for the bench workspace's TS (gates.ts, scenarios.ts, browser/driver.ts). The bench package is NOT in the verify solution (tsconfig.verify.json) or the src LOC budget — its TS is bundled by esbuild at runtime (the bench/conformance pattern), so this config exists solely for `tsc --noEmit -p bench/tsconfig.check.json` to type-check the bench surface against ../src without joining the composite build (no .tsbuild race). DOM lib is on because browser/driver.ts is the in-page runner driver; the ambient __DEV__/__TV_PROFILE__ globals come from ../src/globals.d.ts.
